package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11+ build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) lack support for modern syntax and packages required by the new frontend toolchain, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed and replaced by Angular CLI; without this change, the build scripts and dependencies would fail to resolve or execute.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Karma/Jasmine test runner with Jest for unit testing.
package.json.why_exists: Karma and Jasmine dependencies are removed; test scripts now invoke Jest, so old dependencies would cause missing module errors.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator version to align with the new project structure and JDK 11 compatibility.
package.json.why_exists: Old generator versions produce code incompatible with the new JDK 11 target and Angular 11 frontend stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security OAuth 2.0 library with Spring Boot's native OAuth 2.0 Client and Resource Server starters.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `spring-security-oauth2` library is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; code using it will fail to compile or link against the new Spring Security API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase Hibernate extension dependency from version 4 to version 5 to support JPA 2.1+ and Hibernate 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Liquibase Hibernate 4 extension is incompatible with Hibernate 5/JPA 2.1+ used in JDK 11/Spring Boot 2.x, causing runtime classpath errors or schema generation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target configuration, the compiler may default to an older Java version, causing compilation errors for Java 11-specific features or warnings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB runtime dependency to annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without the explicit dependency, annotation processors relying on JAXB (like some JPA/Hibernate tools) will fail at compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Validation API dependency to Liquibase plugin dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `javax.validation` API was removed from the JDK in Java 11; Liquibase Hibernate 5 extension requires it at runtime, leading to NoClassDefFoundError if not provided.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x datasource configuration to Spring Boot 2.x HikariCP format.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed support for `spring.datasource.dataSourceClassName` and `spring.datasource.databaseName`/`serverName` for H2; it requires `spring.datasource.type` and standard JDBC URL properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
spring:
    datasource:
        dataSourceClassName: org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource
        url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipster;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
        databaseName: 
        serverName: 
        username: 
        password:
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
spring:
  datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipsteroauth2sampleapplication;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE
    username: jhipsterOauth2SampleApplication
    password:
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari
      auto-commit: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update JPA/Hibernate configuration properties to Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x renamed `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming-strategy` to `spring.jpa.hibernate.naming.physical-strategy` and removed `spring.jpa.database` in favor of `spring.jpa.database-platform`.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
spring:
    jpa:
        database-platform: com.mycompany.myapp.domain.util.FixedH2Dialect
        database: H2
        openInView: false
        show_sql: true
        generate-ddl: false
        hibernate:
            ddl-auto: none
            naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Liquibase configuration from root level to Spring Boot 2.x nested structure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires Liquibase properties to be nested under `spring.liquibase` instead of root `liquibase`.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot 2.x message cache duration format.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed `spring.messages.cache-seconds` to `spring.messages.cache-duration` requiring ISO 8601 duration format.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Remove deprecated Spring Boot 1.x metrics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `metrics` namespace in favor of Micrometer; keeping these properties causes binding errors or is ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration for Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed `spring.thymeleaf.mode` (defaults to HTML5) and changed property nesting.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
spring:
    thymeleaf:
        mode: XHTML
        cache: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions and incompatible with modern Spring Boot auto-configuration which expects HikariCP.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update MySQL JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer MySQL Connector/J.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions fail to connect or throw warnings/errors if serverTimezone is not specified and useSSL is not explicitly set.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard JPA configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy is removed in Hibernate 5.3+ (used in Spring Boot 2.x/JDK 11 era), causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate cache region factory class to match newer Hibernate/Ehcache integration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory is removed/renamed in newer Hibernate versions, causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot Actuator configuration from legacy 1.x properties to Spring Boot 2.x management namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security OAuth2 configuration from legacy resource server properties to Spring Security 5.x OAuth2 Resource Server format.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Security 5.x deprecated/removed the `spring.security.oauth2.resource` and legacy `jhipster.security` properties in favor of `spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver` or client registration models; old properties are ignored causing auth failures.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
authentication:
    oauth:
        clientid: jhipsterapp
        secret: mySecretOAuthSecret
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        provider:
          oidc:
            issuer-uri: http://localhost:9080/auth/realms/jhipster
        registration:
          oidc:
            client-id: web_app
            client-secret: web_app

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom JHipster namespace to standard Spring Boot `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The custom `async:` namespace is not recognized by Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration; standard `spring.task.execution` is required for thread pool configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-oauth-2-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster namespace to standard Spring Boot `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The custom `mail:` namespace is not recognized by Spring Boot 2.x; standard `spring.mail` is required for JavaMailSender auto-configuration.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger documentation configuration from legacy `swagger:` namespace to JHipster-specific `jhipster.api-docs` namespace compatible with Springfox 2.x/3.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The root-level `swagger:` namespace is not standard in Spring Boot 2.x JHipster apps; configuration must be under `jhipster.api-docs` or `springdoc` to be picked up by the documentation generator.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterOauth2SampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterOauth2SampleApplication API documentation
